title: 8 Effective Herbal Creams for Hypothyroidism Symptoms

remedy_constituents.constituent_desc: Withanolides have been found to help with hypothyroidism because they contain compounds that help to improve thyroid function, increase the production of thyroid hormones, and enhance the overall health of the thyroid gland.

Saponins are good for hypothyroidism because they help improve thyroid function by increasing the production of thyroid hormones and reducing inflammation in the thyroid gland, which can lead to improved metabolism and energy levels.
Alkaloids are good for hypothyroidism because they help to regulate the thyroid function by reducing oxidative stress, improving adrenal function, and increasing the production of thyroid hormones.

remedies.remedy_desc: Withania somnifera, also known as ashwagandha, is a plant-based remedy that can help with hypothyroidism symptoms. The roots of this plant contain special chemicals that can help regulate the thyroid gland, which is responsible for producing hormones that control metabolism. When the thyroid gland doesn't produce enough hormones, it can cause fatigue, weight gain, and cold intolerance. Ashwagandha has been shown to reduce inflammation in the thyroid gland, which can help improve its function. It also has antioxidant properties, which can help protect the thyroid gland from damage caused by free radicals. Some studies have found that ashwagandha can increase the production of thyroid hormones and improve symptoms of hypothyroidism in people who are taking conventional medications. Additionally, ashwagandha creams may help reduce stress and anxiety, which can also contribute to hypothyroidism symptoms.

remedy_constituents.constituent_desc: Flavonoids are good for hypothyroidism because they help to protect the thyroid gland from damage, reduce oxidative stress, and improve its function by boosting antioxidant levels in the body.

remedies.remedy_desc: Astragalus membranaceus cream is a traditional Chinese medicine that may help with hypothyroidism. This herb has been used for centuries to boost the immune system and increase energy levels. Research suggests that it may also have a positive effect on the thyroid gland by stimulating the production of thyroid hormones. Astragalus membranaceus contains compounds that help protect the thyroid gland from damage and promote its function. It may also help to increase the levels of triiodothyronine (T3) and thyroxine (T4), which are essential hormones produced by the thyroid gland. Additionally, Astragalus membranaceus has anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce inflammation in the thyroid gland and promote overall thyroid health. Some studies have shown that taking Astragalus membranaceus supplements can improve symptoms of hypothyroidism, such as fatigue, weight gain, and dry skin. However, it is essential to note that Astragalus membranaceus cream should not be used as a replacement for conventional medical treatment, but rather as a complementary therapy under the guidance of a healthcare professional.

remedies.remedy_desc: Glycyrrhiza glabra cream, also known as licorice root cream, is a popular remedy for hypothyroidism. The cream contains a compound called glycyrrhizin, which has anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce thyroid inflammation. When the thyroid gland is inflamed, it can't produce enough hormones, leading to hypothyroidism. Glycyrrhizin also helps block the conversion of T4 to reverse T3, a process that can contribute to hypothyroidism symptoms. Additionally, the cream contains antioxidants that help reduce oxidative stress in the body, which can also contribute to hypothyroidism. By reducing inflammation and oxidative stress, Glycyrrhiza glabra cream may help improve thyroid function and alleviate symptoms of hypothyroidism such as fatigue, weight gain, and cold intolerance. Some people use the cream topically on the thyroid area, while others take it orally in supplement form. It's essential to note that while Glycyrrhiza glabra cream may help alleviate hypothyroidism symptoms, it should not be used as a replacement for medical treatment. Consult a healthcare professional before using the cream, especially if you have any underlying health conditions or are taking medications.

remedies.remedy_desc: Schisandra chinensis cream is a natural remedy that may help people with hypothyroidism. This is because it contains a compound called schisandrins, which are antioxidants that help protect the thyroid gland from damage. The thyroid gland is responsible for producing hormones that help our body regulate metabolism, and when it doesn't produce enough hormones, it can lead to hypothyroidism. Schisandrins in the cream may help reduce inflammation in the thyroid gland and improve its function. This, in turn, may help increase the production of thyroid hormones, which can help alleviate symptoms of hypothyroidism such as fatigue, weight gain, and cold intolerance. Additionally, Schisandra chinensis cream is rich in vitamins and minerals that are essential for the proper functioning of the thyroid gland. These include vitamin C, vitamin E, and zinc, which may help boost the immune system and support the thyroid gland's ability to produce hormones.
remedies.remedy_preparation: I can't provide medical advice, but I can give general information about Eleutherococcus senticosus and hypothyroidism. Eleutherococcus senticosus is an herb, also known as Siberian Ginseng, and is not a replacement for medical treatment of hypothyroidism. If you have hypothyroidism, you should follow the advice of a qualified healthcare provider. However, some herbal practitioners use Eleutherococcus senticosus in creams to help with its symptoms. To make an Eleutherococcus senticosus cream, you need dried root of the herb, coconut oil, beeswax, and a carrier oil like sweet almond oil. First, dry the root of Eleutherococcus senticosus and grind it into a powder. Then, mix the powder with coconut oil and beeswax in a double boiler, and heat it until the beeswax melts. Next, add a carrier oil like sweet almond oil and mix it well. Remove the mixture from the heat and let it cool. Once it's cool and solid, you can transfer it to a jar and use it as a topical cream. However, please note that the effectiveness of this cream for hypothyroidism is not scientifically proven.

remedies.remedy_desc: Silybum marianum cream, also known as milk thistle, is often used to help manage hypothyroidism symptoms. The active compound silymarin in milk thistle is believed to protect the liver, which is responsible for converting thyroid hormones into their active forms. When the liver is healthy, it can work more efficiently to produce these hormones, potentially improving thyroid function. Additionally, silymarin may have antioxidant properties, which can help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress that can contribute to hypothyroidism. Some people also use milk thistle to support adrenal function, which is closely linked to thyroid health. remedies.remedy_desc: Curcuma longa, also known as turmeric, is a natural ingredient found in many health products, including creams. For people with hypothyroidism, using a Curcuma longa cream can be beneficial. This is because the cream contains a powerful compound called curcumin, which has anti-inflammatory properties. When applied topically, curcumin can help reduce inflammation in the thyroid gland, promoting its proper functioning. Additionally, curcumin has antioxidant properties that can protect the thyroid gland from damage caused by free radicals. Free radicals are unstable molecules that can harm the thyroid gland and worsen hypothyroidism symptoms. By reducing inflammation and protecting the thyroid gland from damage, Curcuma longa cream may help improve thyroid function and alleviate symptoms of hypothyroidism, such as fatigue, weight gain, and cold intolerance.

intro_desc: Herbal creams can be a helpful addition to the treatment of hypothyroidism, a condition where the thyroid gland doesn't produce enough hormones. This can lead to symptoms like fatigue, weight gain, and cold intolerance. Withania somnifera, also known as ashwagandha, is a herb that has been traditionally used to help manage stress and anxiety, which can exacerbate hypothyroidism symptoms. It works by reducing cortisol levels and promoting the production of thyroid hormones. Astragalus membranaceus, a Chinese herb, has been shown to have a positive effect on thyroid function by stimulating the production of thyroid hormones and improving the overall health of the thyroid gland. By using herbal creams that contain these herbs, individuals with hypothyroidism may experience an improvement in their symptoms and overall quality of life.  Fixing the issue of hypothyroidism is crucial because it can lead to a range of health problems, including heart disease, high cholesterol, and depression. If left untreated, hypothyroidism can also cause the thyroid gland to become enlarged, leading to swelling in the neck. However, by making lifestyle changes and using herbal creams, individuals can manage their symptoms and improve their overall health. For example, incorporating ashwagandha into a treatment plan may help reduce stress and anxiety, while astragalus membranaceus may help regulate thyroid hormone production. This can lead to a significant improvement in energy levels, weight, and overall well-being.  By addressing hypothyroidism, individuals can improve their lives in many ways. They may experience increased energy levels, allowing them to engage in physical activities and hobbies that bring them joy. They may also notice improvements in their mood and mental clarity, making it easier to manage daily tasks and responsibilities. Additionally, managing hypothyroidism can help individuals achieve and maintain a healthy weight, reducing the risk of related health problems.
supplementary_best: A combination of Withania somnifera, Astragalus membranaceus, and Glycyrrhiza glabra in herbal creams is considered effective for treating hypothyroidism. Withania somnifera, also known as Ashwagandha, helps to reduce stress and anxiety, which can exacerbate hypothyroidism symptoms. Astragalus membranaceus, a Chinese herb, improves thyroid function by stimulating the production of thyroid hormones. Glycyrrhiza glabra, licorice root, has anti-inflammatory properties and helps to protect the thyroid gland from damage. This combination is effective because Withania somnifera and Astragalus membranaceus work together to regulate thyroid function, while Glycyrrhiza glabra provides additional protection to the gland. The three herbs also have a synergistic effect, meaning that their combined power is greater than the sum of their individual effects. When applied topically in cream form, these herbs can be easily absorbed into the skin, allowing them to reach the thyroid gland directly and provide targeted relief from hypothyroidism symptoms.
supplementary_avoid: If you have hypothyroidism, there are some herbal creams you should avoid. One of these is those containing kava (Piper methysticum), as it can lower thyroid hormone levels, making hypothyroidism worse. Kava can also interact with thyroid medications, reducing their effectiveness. Another herb to avoid is licorice root (Glycyrrhiza uralensis is not mentioned, but its relative Glycyrrhiza glabra is), as it can raise blood pressure and worsen heart conditions associated with hypothyroidism. Additionally, you should be cautious with creams containing ashwagandha (Withania is not mentioned, but its relative 'Ashwagandha' is), as high doses can interfere with thyroid function. Furthermore, some herbal creams contain saw palmetto (Serenoa repens), which can interact with thyroid medications and worsen hypothyroidism. Finally, those containing ginkgo biloba should be avoided, as it can lower blood pressure, which can be a problem for people with hypothyroidism who may already have low blood pressure.
supplementary_other_remedies: For people with hypothyroidism, there are several natural remedies that can help. One option is to take omega-3 fatty acids, which are found in fish oil. These fatty acids help reduce inflammation in the body, which can contribute to hypothyroidism. They also support the health of the thyroid gland by promoting the production of thyroid hormones.  Another natural remedy is to take selenium supplements. Selenium is a mineral that helps the thyroid gland make thyroid hormones. If you're not getting enough selenium from your diet, you may need to take supplements to help support your thyroid health.  Some people with hypothyroidism also find relief by taking probiotics. Probiotics are good bacteria that help keep your digestive system healthy. A healthy digestive system is important for the production of thyroid hormones, so taking probiotics can help support your thyroid health.  Ashwagandha is an herb that helps reduce stress, which can contribute to hypothyroidism. When you're stressed, your body produces a hormone called cortisol, which can interfere with the production of thyroid hormones. Taking ashwagandha supplements can help reduce cortisol levels and promote the production of thyroid hormones.  Iodine is an essential mineral for the production of thyroid hormones. If you're not getting enough iodine from your diet, you may need to take supplements to help support your thyroid health. You can get iodine from seaweed, seafood, and dairy products.
supplementary_related_ailments: People with hypothyroidism often experience other health issues due to the underactive thyroid gland not producing enough hormones. One common condition is fatigue, where they feel weak and tired all the time. This is because the thyroid hormone regulates metabolism, and without it, energy levels drop. Medicinal herbs like Ashwagandha and Ginseng can help alleviate fatigue by stimulating the production of thyroid hormones and improving metabolism.  Another issue is weight gain, as the body's ability to convert food into energy is impaired. This can lead to weight gain and difficulty losing weight. Herbs like Triphala and Gymnema can aid in weight management by boosting metabolism and improving digestion.  Some people with hypothyroidism may also experience hair loss, dry skin, and brittle nails due to the lack of thyroid hormones. These symptoms can be helped with herbs like Saw Palmetto, which improves hormone balance, and Schisandra, which promotes skin and hair health.  Additionally, hypothyroidism can lead to depression, anxiety, and mood swings due to the imbalance of thyroid hormones. Herbs like St. John's Wort and Passionflower can help regulate mood and reduce symptoms of depression.  Finally, people with hypothyroidism may experience joint pain and stiffness due to the lack of thyroid hormones. Herbs like Turmeric and Ginger can reduce inflammation and improve joint health, making it easier to move and perform daily activities.  These herbs can help alleviate symptoms of hypothyroidism, but it's essential to consult a healthcare professional before using them, especially if you're already taking medication.
